name: Raspberry Vinaigrette- Pete & Pat Marsh
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the raspberries in a jar and pour the vinegar over them.
2. Let stand for 6 days, shaking up once a day.
3. At the end of the 6th day, strain the mixture to remove solids.
4. Bring the liquid to a boil, then add the sugar and taste for sweetness.
5. Add the remaining sugar and continue boiling for about 1 minute.
6. Pour the vinaigrette into a cruet or an empty, cleaned salad dressing bottle.
Pete likes this best on fresh spinach leaves and sliced almonds. Much better than commercial dressings.
